features.name: Web Lab, Query Formatter & PassCraft
features.description: Small fixes and tweaks across Web Lab, Query Formatter tab, and PassCraft

features.name: Web Lab (HTML/CSS/JS)
features.description: Mini web playground for HTML, CSS, and JS with live preview
details: Added separate HTML, CSS, and JS inputs
Renders output in a larger preview frame for better visibility

features.name: Range Counter
features.description: Added Range tool to count numbers between two values
details: Accepts inputs like 486-585 and returns the count in range

features.name: Processor: Video Mode
features.description: Added in-browser video processing inside the Processor tab
details: Processor now includes Image and Video modes
Video mode supports compression, trim range, and resolution presets
Output format options include WebM and MP4 (with browser capability fallback)
Displays original vs processed size comparison and download action
Added processing loader/status indicator for long-running conversions
Includes browser safety limits for file size and duration

features.name: Excel Flow Text Utility
features.description: New bulk text transformation tool for data wrangling tasks
details: Convert multiline rows to a single delimited line
Split one-line or delimited data back into rows
Copy output directly as TAB-separated Excel columns
Remove duplicate rows with optional case-insensitive mode
Auto-detects delimiter (comma, tab, pipe, semicolon)
Wrap each row with custom prefix/suffix (e.g. ('value'),)
Built-in presets for single-quote and double-quote SQL wrapping
Join wrapped rows by newline, space, comma, or tab

features.name: Conversion Suite Section Switching
features.description: Opening any tool section now correctly closes the previously open one
details: Date→Epoch, Duplicates, CSV/TSV, Excel Flow, Image, PassCraft, NL⇄MD⇄HTML all follow the same exclusive-open behavior
Introduced shared hideAllToolSections() helper to ensure consistency
PassCraft toggle (click twice to close) now works correctly

features.name: Clear Button Placement
features.description: Main Clear button in Conversion Suite no longer shifts down when a tool section opens
details: Moved Clear button to sit directly below the nav buttons row
Button is hidden by default and only visible when Hex/Text, Binary, Base64, Case, Web Lab, API Key, Color, JWT, or Regex is active
Hides automatically when switching to any expandable tool section

features.name: Query Formatter Layout
features.description: Reorganized tools into cleaner cards for better readability and flow
details: Split area into dedicated cards for data formatting and time tools
Added compact clear button on each card for quicker reset
Kept all existing actions and behavior unchanged
Includes dark theme compatible styling

features.name: Clippy Assistant
features.description: Added Clippy mascot that shows helpful tool tips every 15 seconds
details: Added Show/Hide Clippy toggle in the footer
Hide action now disables Clippy immediately
Show action brings Clippy back with tip bubbles

features.name: Epoch Time Converter
features.description: Improved timezone display with day difference indicators
details: Shows IST date as reference for cross-timezone comparison
Grouped day difference indicators (e.g., 'EST/UTC/SAST 1 day behind IST')
Clearer understanding when dates differ across timezones

features.name: Modal Dialogs
details: Click outside modal to close (backdrop click)
Visual cursor feedback on clickable backdrop

features.name: Geo Sight Enter Key
features.description: Fixed incorrect popup appearing when pressing Enter in Location Lookup
details: Enter key now correctly triggers location search only
Removed false ID Calculator validation popup

features.name: Light/Dark Theme Toggle
features.description: Complete theme switching system with localStorage persistence

features.name: Comprehensive Dark Mode
features.description: Full application dark theme coverage across all containers and tools
